commonProblems.h2: Peugeot 4007 Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense

problems.h4: Peugeot 4007 DPF Regeneration Failure - Why DW12 Diesel Engines Clog Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Peugeot 4007 S, SE, Sport, Executive, GT (2007-2012, DW12BTED4, 4HN, 4HK)
problems.rootCause: Short-journey driving prevents active DPF regeneration cycles, causing soot accumulation that triggers limp mode and eventual blockage requiring expensive cleaning or replacement.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Off-vehicle DPF chemical clean, sensor reset, road test regeneration cycle
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if blockage <60%; not suitable for severely clogged units

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New or reconditioned DPF unit fitted, ECU adaptation, emission system calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Restores compliance but doesn't address root cause of clogging

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt DW12 engine with compatible DPF system, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses DPF failure plus any concurrent turbo/EGR damage; best value for high-mileage vehicles

problems.recommendation: On a Peugeot 4007 valued £3,000-£6,000, a full rebuilt DW12 engine with updated DPF compatibility often represents better long-term value than repeated DPF repairs, especially if the vehicle has exceeded 100k miles.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt DW12BTED4 engine prices for your Peugeot 4007

problems.h4: Peugeot 4007 EGR Valve Clogging - Why 2.2 HDi Engines Lose Power
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation valves accumulate carbon deposits from diesel combustion, restricting airflow and triggering fault codes, reduced performance, and increased fuel consumption.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Valve removal, ultrasonic cleaning, optional blanking plate fit (where legal)
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; clogging likely to recur without addressing driving patterns

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New or reconditioned EGR valve fitted, ECU adaptation, emission system check
repairOptions.longevity: Restores function but original design remains prone to clogging

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt engine with updated EGR cooler specification, full emission system compatibility, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Eliminates EGR-related failures plus addresses any consequential turbo or DPF damage

problems.recommendation: If your Peugeot 4007 shows early EGR symptoms under 70k miles, cleaning may suffice. Beyond 90k miles or with recurring faults, a rebuilt DW12 engine with revised EGR components offers superior reliability and value.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Peugeot 4007 4HN engine replacement with updated EGR

problems.h4: Peugeot 4007 Turbocharger Failure DW12 - Why Boost Pressure Drops
problems.affectedModels: Peugeot 4007 Sport, Executive, GT (2008-2012, DW12BTED4, 4HK, DW12C)
problems.rootCause: Turbocharger variable geometry vanes stick from carbon buildup, or oil seal wear allows oil into the intake/exhaust, causing smoke, loss of power, and eventual turbo seizure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Actuator replacement, linkage calibration, boost pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if turbo core is undamaged; doesn't address internal wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New or reconditioned turbo fitted, oil feed/return lines checked, ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Restores boost but doesn't address any consequential engine damage from oil starvation

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt DW12 with upgraded turbo specification, full oil system flush, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses turbo failure plus any bearing, piston or DPF damage caused by oil contamination

problems.recommendation: Turbo failure on a high-mileage Peugeot 4007 often indicates broader engine wear. A rebuilt DW12 engine with upgraded turbo components typically offers better long-term value than standalone turbo replacement on vehicles over 100k miles.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt DW12 turbo diesel prices for your Peugeot 4007

problems.h4: Peugeot 4007 Timing Chain Tensioner Failure - Why DW12 Engines Rattle
problems.rootCause: Early DW12 timing chain tensioners lose hydraulic pressure with age, allowing chain slack that causes rattling noise, timing drift, and in severe cases, valve-piston contact requiring engine replacement.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Updated tensioner kit fitted, timing checked, oil system flushed
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before chain stretch or noise appears; best under 80k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full chain, guides, tensioner replacement, timing recalibration, extensive labour
repairOptions.longevity: Restores timing but doesn't address any wear to bearings, pistons or valves from prior slack

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt DW12 with revised timing components, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Eliminates timing concerns plus addresses any consequential internal damage; best for high-mileage or noisy engines

problems.recommendation: If your Peugeot 4007 DW12 shows timing chain noise, replacement is often more economical than repair due to extensive labour. A rebuilt engine with updated tensioner specification provides peace of mind and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Peugeot 4007 DW12BTED4 engine with updated timing components

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Peugeot 4007
finalCta.paragraph: The Peugeot 4007's DW12 diesel is robust when maintained, but DPF, EGR, turbo and timing chain failures are common on high-mileage examples. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Peugeot 4007 specialists for rebuilt, reconditioned or used engines - all with upgraded components addressing original failure points, nationwide delivery, and a minimum 12-month warranty. Compare quotes today and keep your 4007 on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Peugeot 4007 Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Peugeot 4007 and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Peugeot 4007 Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Peugeot 4007's 2007-2012 production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their DW12 engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Launch Year: DW12BTED4 Diesel & 4B12 Petrol Debut
years.description: The Peugeot 4007 launched with Mitsubishi-platform DW12BTED4 diesel and rare 4B12 petrol options, establishing the engine lineup that would define UK replacement demand.
keyChanges: Peugeot 4007 enters UK market as joint-venture SUV with Mitsubishi Outlander platform
DW12BTED4 2.2L HDi diesel (156hp) becomes dominant powertrain across S, SE, Sport trims
Limited 4B12 2.4L petrol offered on select variants for non-diesel buyers
Early non-DPF emission specification on initial production batches
knownFor: Strong initial sales driven by 7-seat practicality and diesel economy
Early DPF-free specification simplifies emission system but lacks later updates
DW12BTED4 establishes reputation for robustness but DPF sensitivity emerges on urban use
Mitsubishi platform sharing enables cross-compatibility but requires Peugeot-specific ECU calibration
years.cta: Get quotes for 2007 Peugeot 4007 replacement engines
years.ticker: Peugeot 4007 2007 engine replacement • DW12BTED4 used engine • Peugeot 4007 non-DPF diesel

years.description: DPF emission systems became standard on Peugeot 4007 diesel models from 2009, with updated engine codes 4HN and 4HK introducing revised calibration for improved compliance.
keyChanges: DPF particulate filters fitted to all new diesel Peugeot 4007 from early 2009
Engine codes 4HN and 4HK introduced with updated ECU mapping for DPF management
Executive trim launched with enhanced specification and DW12 engine options
Early reports of DPF regeneration issues on short-journey urban vehicles emerge
knownFor: DPF introduction improves emissions but adds complexity and failure points for urban drivers
4HN/4HK codes offer marginal reliability improvements but remain susceptible to clogging
Executive trim popularity drives replacement demand for higher-spec DW12 engines
Timing chain tensioner wear begins appearing on early high-mileage examples
years.ticker: Peugeot 4007 DPF engine • 4HN engine replacement • Peugeot 4007 2009 diesel

years.description: Final production years introduced the DW12C engine code with revised EGR cooler specification, while the GT flagship trim offered the most refined DW12 diesel experience before 4007 discontinuation.
keyChanges: DW12C engine code introduced with updated EGR cooler for improved reliability
GT flagship trim launched with enhanced specification and late-production DW12 engines
Final model year 2012 sees production end as Peugeot focuses on newer SUV platforms
Mitsubishi platform compatibility remains critical for cross-referencing replacement engines
mainEngines: DW12BTED4 - 2.2L diesel DPF (all trims, remaining stock)
knownFor: DW12C specification sought for enhanced EGR reliability on late-model replacements
GT trim commands premium for replacement engines due to higher original specification
Final production engines benefit from accumulated manufacturing refinements
Discontinuation drives increased demand for verified low-mileage donor engines
years.cta: Get quotes for 2010-2012 Peugeot 4007 replacement engines
years.ticker: Peugeot 4007 GT engine • DW12C replacement • Peugeot 4007 2012 diesel

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Peugeot 4007 was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12‑month warranty from UK Peugeot 4007 specialists.

faq.h2: Peugeot 4007 Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Peugeot 4007 engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: Peugeot 4007 engine replacement costs range from £895 for used DW12 units to £2,400+ for rebuilt engines, depending on engine code, condition and warranty. Get instant quotes to compare verified UK suppliers for your specific variant.
keyPoints: Used DW12BTED4 engines start around £895 supply-only
Rebuilt units with warranty typically £1,600-£2,400
Supply & fit labour adds £450-£850 depending on location
Always verify engine code compatibility before ordering
items.cta: Compare Peugeot 4007 engine prices from UK specialists

items.question: What engine codes fit my Peugeot 4007?
items.answer: Peugeot 4007 models use DW12BTED4, 4HN, 4HK or DW12C diesel codes, plus rare 4B12 petrol. Enter your registration or check your V5 logbook to confirm the exact code for your variant before ordering a replacement.
keyPoints: DW12BTED4 is the most common code across all trims
4HN/4HK feature updated ECU calibration for DPF models
DW12C appears on late-production GT and Executive variants

items.question: What causes Peugeot 4007 2.2 HDi engine failure?
items.answer: DPF regeneration failure, EGR valve clogging, turbocharger wear and timing chain tensioner faults are the most common causes of Peugeot 4007 DW12 engine failure, typically appearing between 70k-120k miles.
keyPoints: Short-journey driving accelerates DPF clogging
Carbon buildup restricts EGR valve operation
Turbo oil seals wear on high-mileage examples
Early tensioners may lose hydraulic pressure over time
